◆ Landmark
Connected
How to Use
Navigation
⊕Scroll to zoom in or out on the map.
✥Drag to pan across the map canvas.
⊙The reset button in the toolbar snaps back to the full overview.
Exploring Nodes
◆Click any hex to open its detail card at the bottom of the screen.
⤢Landmark nodes expand into sub-nodes when selected — look for the diamond markers.
↕Drag the grip bar on the detail card to resize the panel.
Connections
—Hover any route line to see the relationship between two zones.
◉Route colors indicate type: teal = clinical, gold = financial, purple = regulatory, green = population.
Toolbar Filters
≡Zone Labels toggles the zone name overlays on the map.
≡Routes shows or hides all connection lines between zones.
≡Tool Nodes highlights hexes that link to interactive tools on this site.
